crabcc.description: Symbol index for AI agents — sym/refs/callers/outline/fuzzy/grep over the repo index (build/refresh via `crabcc index`). Structured JSON, far cheaper than grep -rn.

github.description: GitHub repo, issues, PRs, and docs. Write actions require operator approval.

context7.description: Focused docs lookup for Nix, Zig, MCP, eBPF, libbpf, raylib, and related ecosystem docs.

workspace-fs.description: Sandboxed repo filesystem only. No secrets, no home directory, no global paths.

serena.description: Serena — LSP-based semantic-code MCP (40+ langs incl C++ via clangd): find_symbol, references, symbolic edits. Source-code only (not binaries). Fills crabcc's C++ gap + token-efficient editing of our Python/Zig source. Canonical uvx install (NOT a marketplace). See docs/oracle/MCP-FLEET.md.
